command: docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='vector_memory'" | grep -q '1' || docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE vector_memory;' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS embeddings (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT NOT NULL, embedding vector(1536), layer TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '"'"'general'"'"', metadata JSONB DEFAULT '"'"'{}'"'"', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embeddings_cosine ON embeddings USING ivfflat (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists = 50);' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embeddings_layer ON embeddings (layer);' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embeddings_created ON embeddings (created_at);' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d vector_memory -c "SELECT extversion FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='vector';" && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d vector_memory -c '\dt embeddings' && echo 'SETUP COMPLETE' && cat /opt/n8n/.env | grep -i POSTGRES_PASSWORD && cat /home/rag/.env 2>/dev/null | grep PG_ || echo 'No /home/rag/.env PG vars'
intent: Создание БД vector_memory, расширения pgvector, таблицы embeddings с индексами на VPS
